MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.log_parser
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/log_parser.py (725 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Security Log Parser

"Good news, everyone! I can read logs faster than Bender drinks!"

Advanced log parsing with security-focused analysis.

CLASSES:
- LogType(Enum): Types of security logs.
- SecurityEventType(Enum): Security-relevant event types.
- ParsedLogEntry: A parsed log entry with security context.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- SecurityInsight: Security insight from log analysis.
- LogAnalysisReport: Comprehensive log analysis report.
- SecurityLogParser: Advanced security log parser.

Supports:
- Multiple log formats (syslog, Windows
  Methods: def detect_log_type(self, sample_lines: List[str]) -> LogType
  Methods: def parse_line(self, line: str, log_type: Optional[LogType]=None, source: str='') -> ParsedLogEntry
  Methods: def parse_file(self, file_path: str, log_type: Optional[LogType]=None, max_lines: Optional[int]=None
  Methods: def analyze(self, entries: List[ParsedLogEntry], detect_anomalies: bool=True) -> LogAnalysisReport
  Methods: def search(self, entries: List[ParsedLogEntry], query: str='', event_type: Optional[SecurityEventTyp
